violations.text: Salami & Cheese sandwiches received at 54 degrees F. No ice packs were present in coolers or thermal milk delivery bag. Sodexo DM was called during inspection to discuss this repeat violation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Ham & cheese sandwich in the delivery cooler was 46 degrees F. Cold food must be delivered at 41 degrees F or below. Sodexo was notified as ice packs appear to be inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The hand-washing sink in the toilet rooms were lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
